productName: Collections - T2 - Hash Rosin - Maple Drip #6 - (DOH) - 1g
description: Top-shelf hybrid hash rosin, made by ice-water washing Maple Drip into bubble hash, then pressing that hash into pure, terpene-drenched oil — two crafts in one jar. Smooth, potent, and terp-heavy — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, leading into a balanced head-and-body experience.
